---
name: Idea
about: Share an idea for cheGi — no implementation required
title: "[Idea] "
labels: idea
assignees: ""
---

**The idea**
What would you like cheGi to do? Describe it freely.

**What problem does it solve?**
How would this make your workflow better?

**Which part of cheGi does it relate to?**

- Scanning
- Security guard
- Sync / Reword
- Environment setup
- Gitignore generator
- Configuration
- Documentation
- Other:

**Priority from your perspective**

- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Important
- [ ] Game-changer

**Additional notes**
Any references, examples from other tools, or random thoughts.

---

> 🌱 cheGi grows with its community. Bug reporters, feature builders, and idea givers all share in the project's success — bounties and rewards are on the roadmap.
